MINlSTRY OF CONSUMER AFFAIRS, FOOD AND PUBLIC DISTRIBUTION (DepartmentofFood and Publk Distribution) . NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th February, 2008 G.S.R. llS(E).-In exercise ofthe powers conferred by Section 9 ofthe Sugar Development Fund Act, 1982 (4 of 1982), the Central Goverrunent hereby makes the follow- ing rules further to amend the Sugar Development Fund Rules, l983,namely:- 1: (l) These rules may be called the Sugar Development Fund (Amendment) Rules, 2008. (2) They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette. 2. In the Sugar Development Fund Rules, 1983, (a) in rule 26 . (~ in sub-rule (3), for the word and fig ures "FORM fX" the word and figures ·"FORM XI" shall be substituted; (iQ the "FORM NO. fX" occurring after sub-rule (14) shall be omitted; (b) after"Form X", tlte following Form shall be inserted,- "Forrn No. XI [See rul,e 26] Application for reschedulement of loan taken from Sugar Development Fund towards promoters' contribu- tion for fmancing modernization/rehabilitation scheme. I. Name ofthe applicant: 2. Address: (i) Registered Office : (u') Location of the factory : 3. Constitution (whether Co-operative Society or Private or Public Limited Company or Joint Sector/Public Sec- tor Company): 4. Date of incorporation/Registration; 5. Management: (a) Board ofDirectors : (b) Executive set-up: 3 6. Particulars ofthe Order or Draft Rehabilitation Scheme of the Board for Industrial and Financial Reconstruc- tion or Committee for Rehabilitation. 7. Brief description oft he proposed Scheme of rehabil ita- tion: 8. (A) Particulars of the factory: Previous year Projection for next 3 years (1) Licensed crushing capacity (TCD) (2) Installed crushing capacity (TCD) (3) Area under sugarcane (acres) (4) Average yield (tonnes/acre) (5) Total production of sugarcane in the area (lakh tonnes) (6) Gross duration of the season (days) (7) Net duration of the season (days) (8) Total cane croshed (lakh tonnes) (9) Average sugar recovery % (10) Total sugar produced (quintals) Note : In case the performance has not been upto the accepted norms and if there has been wide fluctuation in the performance please state the reasons in brief. (B) Working results: Previous year (1) Net sales (2) Gross profit/loss (3) Interest on : (a) Tenn loan (b) Working capital (c) Total (4) Depreciation (5) Operation profit/loss (6) Tax (7) Net profit/loss (8) · Cash accruals Projection for Next 3 years (9) Applicable statutory cane price fixed by the Goverrunent of.lndia (rupees per quintal) (10) Actual cane price paid (rupees per quintal) (11) Cane Price Arrears. (C) Financial Position: (l) (a) Gross fixed assets including work- in-progress (b) Less Depreciation (2) Net fixed assets (3) Investments -- 1 of 2 -- 4 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA: EXTRAORDINARY [PART 11-SEC. 3(i)] ; -- - (4) Current Assets (5) Current Liabilities (6) Net Working Capital [(4) mi~us (5)] (7) Net tangible assets [(2)+(3)(6)] (8) Long-tenn liabilities (9) Shareholder's worth [(7) minus (8)] (10) Share capital including share suspense and non-refundable deposits (II) Reserves and surplus (12) Deticit in profit and loss account and Intan- gible assets (13) Net worth [(I 0+ (11) minus (12)] (14) Fixed Average Coverage Ratio for project of Factory/Company as a whole : (a) at the time ofapplying for reschedulement (b) at the time of applying for initial loan. (15) Debt Service Coverage Ratio of project of Factory/Company as a whole (a) at the time of applying for reschedulement (b) at the time of applying for initial loan. 9. Loan taken from Sugar Development Fund : Break up on loan : Loan Interest Penal Interest 10. (a) Details of the reliefs or concessions from the Central Government or State Government or Financial Institutions or Scheduled Bank and Other Banks or donations from the employees of the sugar undertaking and other agencies, if any, included in the Draft Rehabilitation Scheme Order of the Board for Industrial and Financial Reconstruction or Recommendation of the Committee of Rehabilitation. (b~ 'l'.'hether the concerned agencies have agreed to provide these reliefs/concessions to the sugar undertakings? If so copies of the consent letters from the concerned agencies are to be provided alongwith this application fonn. 11. Schedule of implementation oft.he scheme: I 2. Please furnish a summary ofthe projected profitability/ cash flow statements for l 0 years on implementation of the scheme aJongwith critical asswnptions. Signed by: Name: Designation : Place: Date: Name and address of the sugar unit or factory''. [F. No. li-812004-SDF] ABTNASH VERMA, Director Note:-The principal rules were published in the Gazette oflndia, Extraordinary, Pan ll, Section 3, Sub- section (i) , vide G.S.R. 752(E), dated the 28th September, 1983 and were subsequently amended by:- (i) G.S.R 817(E), dated the 20th December, 1984 (ii) G.S.R. 838(E), dated the 14th November, 1985 (iii) G.S.R. 55 !(E), dated tl1e 6th May, 1986 (iv) G.S.R. 235(E), dated the 24th April, 1991 (v) G.S.R.441(E),datedthe28thApril, 1992 (vi) G.S.R. 435(E), dated the 6th May, 1994 (vii) G.S.R. 27(E), dated the 12th January, 1996 (viii) G.S.R. 656(E), dated the 21st November, 1997 (lx) G.S.R. 91 (E), dated the 12th February, 2001 (x) G.S.R. 886(E), dated the 6th December, 200 I (xi) G.S.R. 443(E), dated the 21st June, 2002 (xii) G.S.R. 584(E), dated the 19th August, 2002 · (xiii) G.S.R. 67(E), dated the 29th January, 2003 (xiv) G.S.R. 24l(E), dated the 25th March, 2003 (xv) G.S.R. 787(E), dated the 6th October, 2003 (xvi) G.S.R. 895(E), dated the 19th November, 2003 (xviJ) G.S.R. 953(E), dated the I 7th December, 2003 (xviii) G.S.R. 72(E), dated the 23rd January, 2004 (xix) G.S.R.687(E), dated the21 st October, 2004 (xx) G.S.R. 739(E,) dated the 9th November, 2004 (XXI) G.S.R. 149(E), dated the 2nd March, 2005 (xxil) G.S.R. 451 (E) dated the 4th July, 2005 (xxili) G.S.R. 558(E), dated the I 5th September, 2006 (xxiv) G.S.R. 118(E), dated the 9th March, 2007 (XXV) G.S.R.. 69J(E), dated the 7th November, 2007 (xxvi) G.S.R. 699(E), dated the 8th November, 2007 (xxvii).
